title: helianthus rugosus
intro: Helianthus rugosus, also known as the rough-leaved sunflower, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Helianthus genus, commonly found in the western United States and Canada. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Helianthus rugosus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of Helianthus rugosus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
